archetype: Semiconductor Photolithography Stage Alignment and Vibration Suppression Orchestration System
description: Orchestrates sub-nanometer alignment of silicon wafers during photolithography by integrating interferometer feedback, piezoelectric actuators, and real-time vibration cancellation. Used by fab engineers to maintain overlay accuracy across 300mm wafers; complexity arises from deterministic microsecond-latency control loops and legacy hardware interfaces.
rules: MUST enforce SEMI E90 equipment communication standards and SECS/GEM protocol for fab-wide integration.
MUST maintain deterministic 10kHz control loop timing with jitter under 1 microsecond for stage stability.
MUST compensate for environmental vibrations via real-time fusion of accelerometer, air-bearing pressure, and seismic sensor data.
MUST track full data lineage per SEMI PV2-0204 for wafer history and process traceability.
MUST support hot-swappable calibration routines to avoid fab downtime during maintenance.
anti_patterns: DO NOT use cloud-based control logic due to network latency violating deterministic timing requirements.
DO NOT rely on polling for sensor data; event-driven architectures with hardware interrupts are mandatory.
DO NOT ignore hardware-specific drift models; piezo actuators and laser interferometers require per-tool calibration curves.
key_technical_challenges: Achieving sub-nanometer positional accuracy while suppressing floor vibrations across multiple resonant frequencies.
Fusing heterogeneous sensor data (interferometers, capacitance gauges, accelerometers) with different update rates into a single real-time state estimate.
Synchronizing motion control across six axes (three translational, three rotational) with zero cumulative error during step-and-scan exposures.

recommended_stack.language: C++17 with real-time extensions for low-latency deterministic control loops
recommended_stack.framework: ROS 2 (Real-Time) for modular hardware abstraction and lifecycle management
recommended_stack.database_engine: TimescaleDB for high-frequency time-series sensor data and alignment logs
recommended_stack.cache: Redis with RedisTimeSeries for in-memory state caching of current alignment parameters
recommended_stack.message_broker: ZeroMQ (PUB/SUB) for nanosecond-latency inter-process communication between control modules
special_services: Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for legacy vendor-specific stage controllers
SECS/GEM Gateway service for SEMI-compliant host communication
Vibration Spectrum Analyzer using FFT on real-time accelerometer streams
